title: AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026

detail.title: AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026
detail.short_info: AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026 notification has been released for unmarried female candidates. Registration will start after NEET UG 2026 result on joinindianarmy.nic.in. Check 220 seats, eligibility, application dates and selection process here.

content.text: AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026 notification has been released for female candidates. Armed Forces Medical Services (AFMS) will conduct admission to 4-year B.Sc. Nursing Course 2026 in Colleges of Nursing under AFMS. Online registration will start after the declaration of NEET UG 2026 result on the official website joinindianarmy.nic.in.

sections.heading: Overview of AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026

items: Only unmarried, divorcee, legally separated or widow female candidates without encumbrances.
Must be a citizen of India.
Age Limit: Born between 01 October 2001 and 30 September 2009 (both days inclusive).
Educational Qualification: Passed 10+2 in first attempt with Physics, Chemistry, Biology (Botany & Zoology) and English with minimum 50% aggregate marks.

sections.heading: How to Apply for AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026

items: Click on the AFMS B.Sc Nursing Admission 2026 link (activated after NEET result).
Complete registration using valid Email ID and Mobile Number.
Submit and take printout of the application.

content.text: Apply Online Link: Will be available on https://www.joinindianarmy.nic.in/ after NEET UG 2026 result.

items: Merit based on NEET UG 2026 Score
